fig_Il6_cp_control <- Il6_cp_control %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Group) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n = sum(!is.na(control)),
    mean = mean(control, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(control, na.rm = TRUE),
    se = sd / sqrt(n),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

max_y <- max(fig_Il6_cp_control$mean + fig_Il6_cp_control$se)
range_y <- max(fig_Il6_cp_control$mean + fig_Il6_cp_control$se) - min(fig_Il6_cp_control$mean)

max_y <- max(fig_Il6_cp_control$mean + fig_Il6_cp_control$se) #formatting for asterisk
bracket_y <- max_y + 0.15 * range_y  #formatting for asterisk
bracket_bottom <- max_y + 0.05 * range_y #formating for asterisk
star_y <- max_y + 0.18 * range_y #formatting for asterisk


stoodis_colors <- c(
  "BBS/HC" = "#B3E1F0",
  "BBS/IS" = "#148CBA",
  "M. aurum/HC" = "#98E0B1",
  "M. aurum/IS" = "#21A951")

Il6_cp_control_plot <- ggplot(data = fig_Il6_cp_control, aes(x = Group, y = mean, fill = Group)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "black", width = 0.5) +
   scale_fill_manual(
    name = "Group",
    values = stoodis_colors, 
    labels = c(
      "BBS/HC",
      "BBS/IS",
      expression(italic("M. aurum")*"/HC"),
      expression(italic("M. aurum")*"/IS")
    )
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_blank()
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.20))
  ) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = mean - se, ymax = mean + se),
    width = 0.1,
    color = "black",
    alpha = 0.5,
    linewidth = 0.5
  ) +
     annotate("segment", x = 1, xend = 2, y = bracket_y, yend = bracket_y, linewidth = 0.5) +
     annotate("segment", x = 1, xend = 1, y = bracket_bottom, yend = bracket_y, linewidth = 0.5) +
     annotate("segment", x = 2, xend = 2, y = bracket_bottom, yend = bracket_y, linewidth = 0.5) +
     annotate("text", x = 1.5, y = star_y, label = "**", size = 8, fontface = "bold") +
  
   theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = "white"),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 25),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 23),
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.75, colour = "black", linetype = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(
      hjust = 0.5,
      size = 25,
      margin = margin(b = 10)
    ),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 20, r = 10, b = 10, l = 10),
    
    legend.title = element_text(size = 40),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 30),
    legend.key.width = unit(1.0, "cm"),
    legend.key.height = unit(0.6, "cm")
  ) +
  ggtitle(expression(italic(Il6))) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab(expression(atop(" Relative choroid plexus " * italic(Il6) * " mRNA Expression", "% of BBS/HC control")))
Il6_cp_control_plot

Il4_cp_control$Condition <- as.factor(Il4_cp_control$Condition)
Il4_cp_control$Treatment <- as.factor(Il4_cp_control$Treatment)
Il4_cp_control$Group <- factor(Il4_cp_control$Group, levels = c("BBS/HC", "BBS/IS", "M. aurum/HC", "M. aurum/IS"))

fig_Il4_cp_control <- Il4_cp_control %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Group) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n = sum(!is.na(control)),
    mean = mean(control, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(control, na.rm = TRUE),
    se = sd / sqrt(n),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

Il4_cp_control_plot <- ggplot(data = fig_Il4_cp_control, aes(x = Group, y = mean, fill = Group)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "black", width = 0.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "Group",
    values = stoodis_colors, 
    labels = c(
      "BBS/HC",
      "BBS/IS",
      expression(italic("M. aurum")*"/HC"),
      expression(italic("M. aurum")*"/IS")
    )
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_blank()
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.14))
  ) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = mean - se, ymax = mean + se),
    width = 0.1,
    color = "black",
    alpha = 0.5,
    linewidth = 0.5
  ) +
   theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = "white"),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 25),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 23),
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.75, colour = "black", linetype = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(
      hjust = 0.5,
      size = 25,
      margin = margin(b = 10)
    ),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 20, r = 10, b = 10, l = 10),
    
    legend.title = element_text(size = 40),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 30),
    legend.key.width = unit(1.0, "cm"),
    legend.key.height = unit(0.6, "cm")
  ) +
  ggtitle(expression(italic(Il4))) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab(expression(atop(" Relative choroid plexus " * italic(Il4) * " mRNA Expression", "% of BBS/HC control")))
Il4_cp_control_plot    

Tnf_cp_control$Condition <- as.factor(Tnf_cp_control$Condition)
Tnf_cp_control$Treatment <- as.factor(Tnf_cp_control$Treatment)
Tnf_cp_control$Group <- factor(Tnf_cp_control$Group, levels = c("BBS/HC", "BBS/IS", "M. aurum/HC", "M. aurum/IS"))


fig_Tnf_cp_control <- Tnf_cp_control %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Group) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n = sum(!is.na(control)),
    mean = mean(control, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(control, na.rm = TRUE),
    se = sd / sqrt(n),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


Tnf_cp_control_plot <- ggplot(data = fig_Tnf_cp_control, aes (x = Group, y = mean, fill = Group)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "black", width = 0.5) +
   scale_fill_manual(
    name = "Group",
    values = stoodis_colors, 
    labels = c(
      "BBS/HC",
      "BBS/IS",
      expression(italic("M. aurum")*"/HC"),
      expression(italic("M. aurum")*"/IS")
    )
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_blank()
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.14))
  ) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = mean - se, ymax = mean + se),
    width = 0.1,
    color = "black",
    alpha = 0.5,
    linewidth = 0.5
  ) +
   theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = "white"),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 25),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 23),
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.75, colour = "black", linetype = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(
      hjust = 0.5,
      size = 25,
      margin = margin(b = 10)
    ),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 20, r = 10, b = 10, l = 10),
    
    legend.title = element_text(size = 40),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 30),
    legend.key.width = unit(1.0, "cm"),
    legend.key.height = unit(0.6, "cm")
  ) +
  ggtitle(expression(italic(Tnf))) +
  xlab("") +
 ylab(expression(atop(" Relative choroid plexus " * italic(Tnf) * " mRNA Expression", "% of BBS/HC control")))
Tnf_cp_control_plot

maurum_cp_genes_control <- ggarrange(Il6_cp_control_plot, Il4_cp_control_plot,
                             Tnf_cp_control_plot,
                             ncol = 2, nrow = 2,
                             labels = c("A","B","C","D"),
                             widths = c(1,1),
                             heights = c(0.25,0.25),
                             font.label = list(size = 30, face = "bold"),
                             common.legend = TRUE,
                             legend = "right")

# merge plots and save
maurum_cp_genes_control

ggsave(maurum_cp_genes_control, filename = "Maurum_data/R_figures/maurum_cp_inflammatory_control.jpeg", device = "jpeg", dpi = 600, width = 20, height = 15)

ggsave(
  filename = "Maurum_Data/R_figures/maurum_cp_inflammatory_control.svg",
  plot = maurum_cp_genes_control,
  device = svglite::svglite,
  units = "in",
  width = 20,
  height = 15
)

Cd169 expression and % of control - R.hippocampus

Importing relative gene expression and % of control dataset from Excel

Cd169<- read_excel("Maurum_data/R.Hippocampus/Cd169.xlsx")
Cd169_control<- read_excel("Maurum_data/R.Hippocampus/Cd169_control.xlsx")

Statistical Analysis: Grubbs, Sharpio’s, and Bartlett’s

grubbs.test(Cd169$mRNA[Cd169$Treatment=="bbs"], type = 10, opposite = F, two.sided = F)
## 
##  Grubbs test for one outlier
## 
## data:  Cd169$mRNA[Cd169$Treatment == "bbs"]
## G = 1.99601, U = 0.76637, p-value = 0.3423
## alternative hypothesis: highest value 16.97100386 is an outlier
grubbs.test(Cd169$mRNA[Cd169$Treatment=="maurum"], type = 10, opposite = F, two.sided = F)
## 
##  Grubbs test for one outlier
## 
## data:  Cd169$mRNA[Cd169$Treatment == "maurum"]
## G = 1.76134, U = 0.82813, p-value = 0.6915
## alternative hypothesis: highest value 14.4200074 is an outlier
grubbs.test(Cd169_control$control[Cd169_control$Treatment=="bbs"], type = 10, opposite = F, two.sided = F)
## 
##  Grubbs test for one outlier
## 
## data:  Cd169_control$control[Cd169_control$Treatment == "bbs"]
## G = 1.99601, U = 0.76637, p-value = 0.3423
## alternative hypothesis: highest value 268.53 is an outlier
grubbs.test(Cd169_control$control[Cd169_control$Treatment=="maurum"], type = 10, opposite = F, two.sided = F)
## 
##  Grubbs test for one outlier
## 
## data:  Cd169_control$control[Cd169_control$Treatment == "maurum"]
## G = 1.76128, U = 0.82814, p-value = 0.6916
## alternative hypothesis: highest value 228.16 is an outlier
shapiro.test(Cd169$mRNA[Cd169$Treatment=="bbs"])
## 
##  Shapiro-Wilk normality test
## 
## data:  Cd169$mRNA[Cd169$Treatment == "bbs"]
## W = 0.95351, p-value = 0.4525
shapiro.test(Cd169$mRNA[Cd169$Treatment=="maurum"])
## 
##  Shapiro-Wilk normality test
## 
## data:  Cd169$mRNA[Cd169$Treatment == "maurum"]
## W = 0.9378, p-value = 0.2178
shapiro.test(Cd169_control$control[Cd169_control$Treatment=="bbs"])
## 
##  Shapiro-Wilk normality test
## 
## data:  Cd169_control$control[Cd169_control$Treatment == "bbs"]
## W = 0.95351, p-value = 0.4523
shapiro.test(Cd169_control$control[Cd169_control$Treatment=="maurum"])
## 
##  Shapiro-Wilk normality test
## 
## data:  Cd169_control$control[Cd169_control$Treatment == "maurum"]
## W = 0.93779, p-value = 0.2177
bartlett.test(mRNA ~ Treatment=="bbs", Cd169)
## 
##  Bartlett test of homogeneity of variances
## 
## data:  mRNA by Treatment == "bbs"
## Bartlett's K-squared = 0.65176, df = 1, p-value = 0.4195
bartlett.test(mRNA ~ Treatment=="maurum", Cd169)
## 
##  Bartlett test of homogeneity of variances
## 
## data:  mRNA by Treatment == "maurum"
## Bartlett's K-squared = 0.65176, df = 1, p-value = 0.4195
bartlett.test(control ~ Treatment=="bbs", Cd169_control)
## 
##  Bartlett test of homogeneity of variances
## 
## data:  control by Treatment == "bbs"
## Bartlett's K-squared = 0.65202, df = 1, p-value = 0.4194
bartlett.test(control ~ Treatment=="maurum", Cd169_control)
## 
##  Bartlett test of homogeneity of variances
## 
## data:  control by Treatment == "maurum"
## Bartlett's K-squared = 0.65202, df = 1, p-value = 0.4194

Statisical Analysis: ANOVA and Post-Hocs

Cd169_aov <- aov(mRNA ~ Treatment * Condition, data = Cd169)
summary(Cd169_aov)
##                     Df Sum Sq Mean Sq F value Pr(>F)  
## Treatment            1    0.4    0.38   0.026 0.8739  
## Condition            1   59.9   59.93   4.074 0.0512 .
## Treatment:Condition  1   13.8   13.78   0.937 0.3398  
## Residuals           35  514.8   14.71                 
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
Cd169control_aov <- aov(control ~ Treatment * Condition, data = Cd169_control)
summary(Cd169control_aov)
##                     Df Sum Sq Mean Sq F value Pr(>F)  
## Treatment            1     94      94   0.026 0.8740  
## Condition            1  15006   15006   4.075 0.0512 .
## Treatment:Condition  1   3450    3450   0.937 0.3397  
## Residuals           35 128883    3682                 
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
#So close to p>0.05!!!

Figures and Saving Files

### Relative gene expression ###
Cd169$Condition <- as.factor(Cd169$Condition)
Cd169$Treatment <- as.factor(Cd169$Treatment)
Cd169$Group <- factor(Cd169$Group, levels = c("BBS/HC", "BBS/IS", "M. aurum/HC", "M. aurum/IS"))


fig_Cd169 <- Cd169 %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Group) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n = sum(!is.na(mRNA)),
    mean = mean(mRNA, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(mRNA, na.rm = TRUE),
    se = sd / sqrt(n),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

stoodis_colors <- c(
  "BBS/HC" = "#B3E1F0",
  "BBS/IS" = "#148CBA",
  "M. aurum/HC" = "#98E0B1",
  "M. aurum/IS" = "#21A951")

Cd169_plot <- ggplot(data = fig_Cd169, aes(x = Group, y = mean, fill = Group)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "black", width = 0.5) +
   scale_fill_manual(
    name = "Group",
    values = stoodis_colors, 
    labels = c(
      "BBS/HC",
      "BBS/IS",
      expression(italic("M. aurum")*"/HC"),
      expression(italic("M. aurum")*"/IS")
    )
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_blank()
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = mean - se, ymax = mean + se),
    width = 0.1,
    color = "black",
    alpha = 0.5,
    linewidth = 0.5
  ) +
   theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = "white"),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 25),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 23),
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.75, colour = "black", linetype = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 25, face = "italic"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 30),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 25),
    legend.key.width = unit(1.0, "cm"),
    legend.key.height = unit(0.6, "cm")) +
  ggtitle("") +
  xlab("") +
  ylab(expression(atop(" Relative " * italic(Cd169) * " mRNA Expression")))
      #"(" * 2^{-Delta * Delta * C[q]} * " Values)")))
Cd169_plot

### % to Control ###
Cd169_control$Condition <- as.factor(Cd169_control$Condition)
Cd169_control$Treatment <- as.factor(Cd169_control$Treatment)
Cd169_control$Group <- factor(Cd169_control$Group, levels = c("BBS/HC", "BBS/IS", "M. aurum/HC", "M. aurum/IS"))


fig_Cd169control <- Cd169_control %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Group) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n = sum(!is.na(control)),
    mean = mean(control, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(control, na.rm = TRUE),
    se = sd / sqrt(n),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

stoodis_colors <- c(
  "BBS/HC" = "#B3E1F0",
  "BBS/IS" = "#148CBA",
  "M. aurum/HC" = "#98E0B1",
  "M. aurum/IS" = "#21A951")

Cd169control_plot <- ggplot(data = fig_Cd169control, aes(x = Group, y = mean, fill = Group)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "black", width = 0.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "Group",
    values = stoodis_colors, 
    labels = c(
      "BBS/HC",
      "BBS/IS",
      expression(italic("M. aurum")*"/HC"),
      expression(italic("M. aurum")*"/IS")
    )
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_blank()
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = mean - se, ymax = mean + se),
    width = 0.1,
    color = "black",
    alpha = 0.5,
    linewidth = 0.5
  ) +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = "white"),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 25),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 23),
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.75, colour = "black", linetype = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 25, face = "italic"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 30),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 25),
    legend.key.width = unit(1.0, "cm"),
    legend.key.height = unit(0.6, "cm")) +
  ggtitle("") +
  xlab("") +
   ylab(expression(atop(" Relative hippocampal " * italic(Cd169) * " mRNA Expression", "% of BBS/HC control")))
Cd169control_plot

#maurum_Cd169 <- ggarrange(Cd169_plot, Cd169control_plot,
                             #ncol = 2, nrow = 1,
                             #labels = c("A","B"),
                             #widths = c(1,1),
                             #heights = c(0.25,0.25),
                             #font.label = list(size = 50, face = "bold"),
                             #common.legend = TRUE,
                             #legend = "right")
#maurum_Cd169- we need to separate these figures for the publication 

ggsave(Cd169control_plot, filename = "Maurum_data/R_figures/maurum_cd169_control.jpeg", device = "jpeg", dpi = 600, width = 20, height = 12)

ggsave(
  filename = "Maurum_Data/R_figures/maurum_cd169_control.svg",
  plot = Cd169control_plot,
  device = svglite::svglite,
  units = "in",
  width = 20,
  height = 12
)

ggsave(Cd169_plot, filename = "Maurum_data/R_figures/maurum_cd169.jpeg", device = "jpeg", dpi = 600, width = 20, height = 12)

ggsave(
  filename = "Maurum_Data/R_figures/maurum_cd169.svg",
  plot = Cd169_plot,
  device = svglite::svglite,
  units = "in",
  width = 20,
  height = 12
)

Linear Regression R. hippocampi Il6 vs. JSE Behavior (Condition and Treatment), R.hippocampi Cd169 vs. JSE Behavior (Condition and Treatment), Choroid Plexus Il6 vs. JSE Behavior

Importing linear correlation data from Excel

Il6_JSE_condition<- read_excel("Maurum_data/Regression/Il6_JSE_condition.xlsx")
Il6_JSE_treatment<- read_excel("Maurum_data/Regression/Il6_JSE_treatment.xlsx")
Cd169_JSE_condition<- read_excel("Maurum_data/Regression/Cd169_JSE_condition.xlsx")
Cd169_JSE_treatment<- read_excel("Maurum_data/Regression/Cd169_JSE_treatment.xlsx")
Il6_JSE_cp_condition <- read_excel("Maurum_data/Regression/Il6_JSE_cp_condition.xlsx")
Il6_JSE_cp_treatment <- read_excel("Maurum_data/Regression/Il6_JSE_cp_treatment.xlsx")

Statistical Analysis: Grubbs and Shapiro’s

grubbs.test(Il6_JSE_condition$mRNA[Il6_JSE_condition$group=="BBS/HC"], type = 10, opposite = F, two.sided = F)
## 
##  Grubbs test for one outlier
## 
## data:  Il6_JSE_condition$mRNA[Il6_JSE_condition$group == "BBS/HC"]
## G = 1.43931, U = 0.66178, p-value = 0.5219
## alternative hypothesis: lowest value 0.999609129 is an outlier
grubbs.test(Il6_JSE_condition$mRNA[Il6_JSE_condition$group=="BBS/IS"], type = 10, opposite = F, two.sided = F)
## 
##  Grubbs test for one outlier
## 
## data:  Il6_JSE_condition$mRNA[Il6_JSE_condition$group == "BBS/IS"]
## G = 1.62417, U = 0.48707, p-value = 0.2458
## alternative hypothesis: lowest value 5.608179571 is an outlier
grubbs.test(Il6_JSE_condition$JSE[Il6_JSE_condition$group=="BBS/HC"], type = 10, opposite = F, two.sided = F)
## 
##  Grubbs test for one outlier
## 
## data:  Il6_JSE_condition$JSE[Il6_JSE_condition$group == "BBS/HC"]
## G = 1.59501, U = 0.58464, p-value = 0.3381
## alternative hypothesis: lowest value 42.68156425 is an outlier
grubbs.test(Il6_JSE_condition$JSE[Il6_JSE_condition$group=="BBS/IS"], type = 10, opposite = F, two.sided = F)
## 
##  Grubbs test for one outlier
## 
## data:  Il6_JSE_condition$JSE[Il6_JSE_condition$group == "BBS/IS"]
## G = 1.69047, U = 0.44434, p-value = 0.1906
## alternative hypothesis: lowest value 37.57429421 is an outlier
grubbs.test(Il6_JSE_treatment$mRNA[Il6_JSE_treatment$group=="M. aurum/HC"],type = 10, opposite = F, two.sided = F)
## 
##  Grubbs test for one outlier
## 
## data:  Il6_JSE_treatment$mRNA[Il6_JSE_treatment$group == "M. aurum/HC"]
## G = 1.39883, U = 0.61952, p-value = 0.4903
## alternative hypothesis: highest value 10.26169001 is an outlier
grubbs.test(Il6_JSE_treatment$mRNA[Il6_JSE_treatment$group=="M. aurum/IS"], type = 10, opposite = F, two.sided = F)
## 
##  Grubbs test for one outlier
## 
## data:  Il6_JSE_treatment$mRNA[Il6_JSE_treatment$group == "M. aurum/IS"]
## G = 1.87726, U = 0.42464, p-value = 0.1165
## alternative hypothesis: highest value 13.05209482 is an outlier
grubbs.test(Il6_JSE_treatment$JSE[Il6_JSE_treatment$group=="M. aurum/HC"], type = 10, opposite = F, two.sided = F)
## 
##  Grubbs test for one outlier
## 
## data:  Il6_JSE_treatment$JSE[Il6_JSE_treatment$group == "M. aurum/HC"]
## G = 1.85727, U = 0.32927, p-value = 0.0848
## alternative hypothesis: highest value 117.2365755 is an outlier
grubbs.test(Il6_JSE_treatment$JSE[Il6_JSE_treatment$group=="M. aurum/IS"], type = 10, opposite = F, two.sided = F)
## 
##  Grubbs test for one outlier
## 
## data:  Il6_JSE_treatment$JSE[Il6_JSE_treatment$group == "M. aurum/IS"]
## G = 1.68240, U = 0.53788, p-value = 0.2545
## alternative hypothesis: highest value 113.9100472 is an outlier
shapiro.test(Il6_JSE_condition$mRNA[Il6_JSE_condition$group=="BBS/HC"])
## 
##  Shapiro-Wilk normality test
## 
## data:  Il6_JSE_condition$mRNA[Il6_JSE_condition$group == "BBS/HC"]
## W = 0.96322, p-value = 0.8402
shapiro.test(Il6_JSE_condition$mRNA[Il6_JSE_condition$group=="BBS/IS"])
## 
##  Shapiro-Wilk normality test
## 
## data:  Il6_JSE_condition$mRNA[Il6_JSE_condition$group == "BBS/IS"]
## W = 0.97162, p-value = 0.9099
shapiro.test(Il6_JSE_condition$JSE[Il6_JSE_condition$group=="BBS/HC"])
## 
##  Shapiro-Wilk normality test
## 
## data:  Il6_JSE_condition$JSE[Il6_JSE_condition$group == "BBS/HC"]
## W = 0.91108, p-value = 0.3617
shapiro.test(Il6_JSE_condition$JSE[Il6_JSE_condition$group=="BBS/IS"])
## 
##  Shapiro-Wilk normality test
## 
## data:  Il6_JSE_condition$JSE[Il6_JSE_condition$group == "BBS/IS"]
## W = 0.97901, p-value = 0.9546
shapiro.test(Il6_JSE_treatment$mRNA[Il6_JSE_treatment$group=="M. aurum/HC"])
## 
##  Shapiro-Wilk normality test
## 
## data:  Il6_JSE_treatment$mRNA[Il6_JSE_treatment$group == "M. aurum/HC"]
## W = 0.93491, p-value = 0.5934
shapiro.test(Il6_JSE_treatment$mRNA[Il6_JSE_treatment$group=="M. aurum/IS"])
## 
##  Shapiro-Wilk normality test
## 
## data:  Il6_JSE_treatment$mRNA[Il6_JSE_treatment$group == "M. aurum/IS"]
## W = 0.78998, p-value = 0.02234
# not normal p-value = 0.02234
shapiro.test(Il6_JSE_treatment$JSE[Il6_JSE_treatment$group=="M. aurum/HC"])
## 
##  Shapiro-Wilk normality test
## 
## data:  Il6_JSE_treatment$JSE[Il6_JSE_treatment$group == "M. aurum/HC"]
## W = 0.81196, p-value = 0.05368
shapiro.test(Il6_JSE_treatment$JSE[Il6_JSE_treatment$group=="M. aurum/IS"])
## 
##  Shapiro-Wilk normality test
## 
## data:  Il6_JSE_treatment$JSE[Il6_JSE_treatment$group == "M. aurum/IS"]
## W = 0.97006, p-value = 0.8984

Statistical Analysis: Pearson’s Correlation

Il6_model <- lm(JSE ~ mRNA, data = Il6_JSE_condition)
summary(Il6_model)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = JSE ~ mRNA, data = Il6_JSE_condition)
## 
## Residuals:
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -34.227 -16.848  -4.053  17.781  42.604 
## 
## Coefficients:
##             Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)   88.593     15.343   5.774 6.44e-05 ***
## mRNA          -2.124      1.990  -1.067    0.305    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 25.05 on 13 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.08056,    Adjusted R-squared:  0.009839 
## F-statistic: 1.139 on 1 and 13 DF,  p-value: 0.3053
Il6_model2 <- lm(JSE ~ mRNA, data = Il6_JSE_treatment)
summary (Il6_model2)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = JSE ~ mRNA, data = Il6_JSE_treatment)
## 
## Residuals:
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -36.602  -8.087  -0.862   7.948  31.022 
## 
## Coefficients:
##             Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)   92.674     11.515   8.048 2.09e-06 ***
## mRNA          -1.372      1.576  -0.871      0.4    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 18.69 on 13 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.0551, Adjusted R-squared:  -0.01759 
## F-statistic: 0.7581 on 1 and 13 DF,  p-value: 0.3997
Cd169_model <- lm(JSE ~ mRNA, data = Cd169_JSE_condition)
summary (Cd169_model)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = JSE ~ mRNA, data = Cd169_JSE_condition)
## 
## Residuals:
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -43.080 -21.197  -0.768  13.110  96.850 
## 
## Coefficients:
##             Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)  131.406     17.710   7.420    1e-06 ***
## mRNA          -4.246      1.905  -2.229   0.0396 *  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 35.23 on 17 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.2261, Adjusted R-squared:  0.1806 
## F-statistic: 4.967 on 1 and 17 DF,  p-value: 0.03962
Cd169_model2 <- lm(JSE ~ mRNA, data = Cd169_JSE_treatment)
summary (Cd169_model2)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = JSE ~ mRNA, data = Cd169_JSE_treatment)
## 
## Residuals:
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -39.914 -15.016   1.268  16.620  35.145 
## 
## Coefficients:
##             Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)   52.507     12.658   4.148 0.000604 ***
## mRNA           3.198      1.438   2.224 0.039146 *  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 22.57 on 18 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.2156, Adjusted R-squared:  0.1721 
## F-statistic: 4.948 on 1 and 18 DF,  p-value: 0.03915
Il6_cp_model <- lm(JSE ~ mRNA, data = Il6_JSE_cp_condition)
summary(Il6_cp_model)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = JSE ~ mRNA, data = Il6_JSE_cp_condition)
## 
## Residuals:
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -26.133 -12.785  -5.710   7.858  41.331 
## 
## Coefficients:
##             Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)   
## (Intercept)   79.037     13.549   5.834  0.00112 **
## mRNA          -2.029      1.369  -1.481  0.18899   
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 23.67 on 6 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.2678, Adjusted R-squared:  0.1458 
## F-statistic: 2.195 on 1 and 6 DF,  p-value: 0.189
Il6_cp_model2 <- lm(JSE ~ mRNA, data = Il6_JSE_cp_treatment)
summary (Il6_cp_model2)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = JSE ~ mRNA, data = Il6_JSE_cp_treatment)
## 
## Residuals:
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -26.739  -5.882  -1.985   6.626  30.324 
## 
## Coefficients:
##             Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)  105.778     13.211   8.007 1.17e-05 ***
## mRNA          -3.655      2.349  -1.556    0.151    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 16.4 on 10 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.1949, Adjusted R-squared:  0.1144 
## F-statistic: 2.421 on 1 and 10 DF,  p-value: 0.1508

Figures and Saving Files- R. Hippocampi Il6 vs. JSE Condition and Treatment

# R-squared for Il6 vs. JSE condition 
r2_Il6c <- summary(Il6_model)$r.squared
# p-value for Il6 vs. JSE condition  
pval_Il6c <- summary(Il6_model)$coefficients[2, 4]
# slope for Il6 vs. JSE condition 
slope_Il6c <- summary(Il6_model)$coefficients[2, 1]

# R-squared for Il6 vs. JSE treatment 
r2_Il6t <- summary(Il6_model2)$r.squared
# p-value for Il6 vs. JSE treatment 
pval_Il6t <- summary(Il6_model2)$coefficients[2, 4]
# slope for Il6 vs. JSE treatment 
slope_Il6t <- summary(Il6_model2)$coefficients[2, 1]

cat("Condition model:\n")
## Condition model:
cat("R² =", round(r2_Il6c, 3), "\n") 
## R² = 0.081
cat("p-value =", signif(pval_Il6c, 3), "\n")
## p-value = 0.305
cat("slope =", round(slope_Il6c, 3), "\n")
## slope = -2.124
cat("Treatment model:\n")
## Treatment model:
cat("R² =", round(r2_Il6t, 3), "\n") 
## R² = 0.055
cat("p-value =", signif(pval_Il6t, 3), "\n")
## p-value = 0.4
cat("slope =", round(slope_Il6t, 3), "\n")
## slope = -1.372
# Shared factor levels
all_groups <- c("BBS/HC", "BBS/IS", "M. aurum/HC", "M. aurum/IS")

# Colors
stoodis_colors <- c(
  "BBS/HC" = "#B3E1F0",
  "BBS/IS" = "#148CBA",
  "M. aurum/HC" = "#98E0B1",
  "M. aurum/IS" = "#21A951"
)

# Prepare condition data
Il6_JSE_condition <- Il6_JSE_condition %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Group = factor(group, levels = all_groups),
    mRNA = as.numeric(mRNA),
    JSE = as.numeric(JSE)
  )

# Prepare treatment data
Il6_JSE_treatment <- Il6_JSE_treatment %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Group = factor(group, levels = all_groups),
    mRNA = as.numeric(mRNA),
    JSE = as.numeric(JSE)
  )

# Panel A
Il6_JSE_condition_plot <- ggplot(Il6_JSE_condition, aes(x = mRNA, y = JSE, color = Group)) +
  geom_point(
    size = 3,
    alpha = 0.9
  ) +
   scale_color_manual(
    name = "Group",
    values = stoodis_colors,
    breaks = all_groups,
    labels = c(
      "BBS/HC",
      "BBS/IS",
      expression(italic("M. aurum") * "/HC"),
      expression(italic("M. aurum") * "/IS")
    ),
    drop = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_smooth(
    aes(group = 1),
    method = "lm",
    se = FALSE,
    color = "black",
    linewidth = 1,
    linetype = "solid"
  ) +
  stat_cor(
    aes(group = 1),
    method = "pearson",
    label.x = max(Il6_JSE_condition$mRNA, na.rm = TRUE),
    label.y = max(Il6_JSE_condition$JSE, na.rm = TRUE),
    size = 5,
    hjust = 1,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 18, color = "black"),
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.8),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0.5)
  ) +
     xlab(expression(atop("Relative hippocampal " * italic(Il6) * " mRNA Expression"))) +
  ylab(expression(atop("Time Exploring Juvenile", "% of BBS/HC control")))

# Panel B
Il6_JSE_treatment_plot <- ggplot(Il6_JSE_treatment, aes(x = mRNA, y = JSE, color = Group)) +
  geom_point(
    size = 3,
    alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Group",
    values = stoodis_colors,
    breaks = all_groups,
    labels = c(
      "BBS/HC",
      "BBS/IS",
      expression(italic("M. aurum") * "/HC"),
      expression(italic("M. aurum") * "/IS")
    ),
    drop = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_smooth(
    aes(group = 1),
    method = "lm",
    se = FALSE,
    color = "black",
    linewidth = 1,
    linetype = "solid"
  ) +
  stat_cor(
    aes(group = 1),
    method = "pearson",
    label.x = max(Il6_JSE_treatment$mRNA, na.rm = TRUE),
    label.y = max(Il6_JSE_treatment$JSE, na.rm = TRUE),
    size = 5,
    hjust = 1,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 18, color = "black"),
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.8),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0.5)
  ) +
     xlab(expression(atop("Relative hippocampal " * italic(Il6) * " mRNA Expression"))) +
  ylab(expression(atop("Time Exploring Juvenile", "% of BBS/HC control")))


# Arrange the two Il6 panels first
Il6_panel_plots <- ggarrange(
  Il6_JSE_condition_plot,
  Il6_JSE_treatment_plot,
  ncol = 2,
  nrow = 1,
  labels = c("A", "B"),
  widths = c(1, 1),
  font.label = list(size = 50, face = "bold")
)
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'
# Dummy legend data
legend_Il6_df <- data.frame(
  x = 1:4,
  y = 1:4,
  Group = factor(all_groups, levels = all_groups)
)

# Dummy legend plot
legend_Il6_plot <- ggplot(legend_Il6_df, aes(x = x, y = y, color = Group)) +
  geom_point(size = 4) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Group",
    values = stoodis_colors,
    breaks = all_groups,
    labels = c(
      "BBS/HC",
      "BBS/IS",
      expression(italic("M. aurum") * "/HC"),
      expression(italic("M. aurum") * "/IS")
    ),
    drop = FALSE
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    legend.title = element_text(size = 20),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 18),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

shared_Il6_legend <- cowplot::get_legend(legend_Il6_plot)

# Combine panels + legend
Il6_JSE_plots <- ggarrange(
  Il6_panel_plots,
  shared_Il6_legend,
  ncol = 2,
  widths = c(1, 0.22)
)

# Save JPEG
ggsave(
  filename = "Maurum_data/R_figures/maurum_Il6_JSE_plots.jpeg",
  plot = Il6_JSE_plots,
  device = "jpeg",
  dpi = 600,
  width = 20,
  height = 10
)

# Save SVG
ggsave(
  filename = "Maurum_Data/R_figures/maurum_Il6_JSE_plots.svg",
  plot = Il6_JSE_plots,
  device = svglite::svglite,
  units = "in",
  width = 20,
  height = 10
)

Figures and Saving Files- R. Hipocampi Cd169 vs. JSE Condition and Treatment

# R-squared for Cd169 vs. JSE condition 
r2_Cd169c <- summary(Cd169_model)$r.squared
pval_Cd169c <- summary(Cd169_model)$coefficients[2, 4]
slope_Cd169c <- summary(Cd169_model)$coefficients[2, 1]

# R-squared for Cd169 vs. JSE treatment 
r2_Cd169t <- summary(Cd169_model2)$r.squared
pval_Cd169t <- summary(Cd169_model2)$coefficients[2, 4]
slope_Cd169t <- summary(Cd169_model2)$coefficients[2, 1]

cat("Condition model:\n")
## Condition model:
cat("R² =", round(r2_Cd169c, 3), "\n")
## R² = 0.226
cat("p-value =", signif(pval_Cd169c, 3), "\n")
## p-value = 0.0396
cat("slope =", round(slope_Cd169c, 3), "\n\n")
## slope = -4.246
cat("Treatment model:\n")
## Treatment model:
cat("R² =", round(r2_Cd169t, 3), "\n")
## R² = 0.216
cat("p-value =", signif(pval_Cd169t, 3), "\n")
## p-value = 0.0391
cat("slope =", round(slope_Cd169t, 3), "\n")
## slope = 3.198
# Shared factor levels
all_groups <- c("BBS/HC", "BBS/IS", "M. aurum/HC", "M. aurum/IS")

# Colors
stoodis_colors <- c(
  "BBS/HC" = "#B3E1F0",
  "BBS/IS" = "#148CBA",
  "M. aurum/HC" = "#98E0B1",
  "M. aurum/IS" = "#21A951"
)

# Prepare condition data
Cd169_JSE_condition <- Cd169_JSE_condition %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Group = factor(group, levels = all_groups),
    mRNA = as.numeric(mRNA),
    JSE = as.numeric(JSE)
  )

# Prepare treatment data
Cd169_JSE_treatment <- Cd169_JSE_treatment %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Group = factor(group, levels = all_groups),
    mRNA = as.numeric(mRNA),
    JSE = as.numeric(JSE)
  )

# Panel A
Cd169_JSE_condition_plot <- ggplot(
  Cd169_JSE_condition,
  aes(x = mRNA, y = JSE, color = Group)
) +
  geom_point(
    size = 3,
    alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Group",
    values = stoodis_colors,
    breaks = all_groups,
    labels = c(
      "BBS/HC",
      "BBS/IS",
      expression(italic("M. aurum") * "/HC"),
      expression(italic("M. aurum") * "/IS")
    ),
    drop = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_smooth(
    aes(group = 1),
    method = "lm",
    se = FALSE,
    color = "black",
    linewidth = 1,
    linetype = "solid",
    alpha = 0.8
  ) +
  stat_cor(
    aes(group = 1),
    method = "pearson",
    label.x = Inf,
    label.y = Inf,
    hjust = 1.1,
    vjust = 1.5,
    size = 5,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 18, color = "black"),
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.8),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0.5)
  ) +
  xlab(expression(atop("Relative hippocampal " * italic(Cd169) * " mRNA Expression"))) +
  ylab(expression(atop("Time Exploring Juvenile", "% of BBS/HC control")))

# Panel B
Cd169_JSE_treatment_plot <- ggplot(
  Cd169_JSE_treatment,
  aes(x = mRNA, y = JSE, color = Group)
) +
  geom_point(
    size = 3,
    alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Group",
    values = stoodis_colors,
    breaks = all_groups,
    labels = c(
      "BBS/HC",
      "BBS/IS",
      expression(italic("M. aurum") * "/HC"),
      expression(italic("M. aurum") * "/IS")
    ),
    drop = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_smooth(
    aes(group = 1),
    method = "lm",
    se = FALSE,
    color = "black",
    linewidth = 1,
    linetype = "solid",
    alpha = 0.8
  ) +
  stat_cor(
    aes(group = 1),
    method = "pearson",
    label.x = Inf,
    label.y = Inf,
    hjust = 1.1,
    vjust = 1.5,
    size = 5,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 18, color = "black"),
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.8),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0.5)
  ) +
  xlab(expression(atop("Relative hippocampal " * italic(Cd169) * " mRNA Expression"))) +
  ylab(expression(atop("Time Exploring Juvenile", "% of BBS/HC control")))

# Dummy legend data
legend_df <- data.frame(
  x = 1:4,
  y = 1:4,
  Group = factor(all_groups, levels = all_groups)
)

# Dummy legend plot
legend_plot <- ggplot(legend_df, aes(x = x, y = y, color = Group)) +
  geom_point(size = 4) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Group",
    values = stoodis_colors,
    breaks = all_groups,
    labels = c(
      "BBS/HC",
      "BBS/IS",
      expression(italic("M. aurum") * "/HC"),
      expression(italic("M. aurum") * "/IS")
    ),
    drop = FALSE
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    legend.title = element_text(size = 20),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 18),
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.key.height = unit(0.8, "cm"),
    legend.key.width = unit(1, "cm")
  )

shared_legend <- cowplot::get_legend(legend_plot)

# Arrange panels
panel_plots <- ggarrange(
  Cd169_JSE_condition_plot,
  Cd169_JSE_treatment_plot,
  ncol = 2,
  nrow = 1,
  labels = c("A", "B"),
  widths = c(1, 1),
  font.label = list(size = 50, face = "bold")
)
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'
# Combine panels + legend
Cd169_JSE_plots <- ggarrange(
  panel_plots,
  shared_legend,
  ncol = 2,
  widths = c(1, 0.22)
)

Cd169_JSE_plots

# Save JPEG
ggsave(
  filename = "Maurum_data/R_figures/maurum_Cd169_JSE_plots.jpeg",
  plot = Cd169_JSE_plots,
  device = "jpeg",
  dpi = 600,
  width = 20,
  height = 10
)

# Save SVG
ggsave(
  filename = "Maurum_Data/R_figures/maurum_Cd169_JSE_plots.svg",
  plot = Cd169_JSE_plots,
  device = svglite::svglite,
  units = "in",
  width = 20,
  height = 10
)

Figures and Saving Files- CP Il6 vs. JSE Condition and Treatment

# R-squared for Il6 vs. JSE condition for linear regression model
r2_Il6c_cp <- summary(Il6_cp_model)$r.squared
# p-value for Cd169 vs. JSE condition for linear regressions model 
pval_Il6c_cp <- summary(Il6_cp_model)$coefficients[2, 4]
# slope for Cd169 vs. JSE condition
slope_Il6c_cp <- summary(Il6_cp_model)$coefficients[2, 1]

# R-squared for Il6 vs. JSE treatment 
r2_Il6t_cp <- summary(Il6_cp_model2)$r.squared
# p-value for Cd169 vs. JSE treatment
pval_Il6t_cp <- summary(Il6_cp_model2)$coefficients[2, 4]
# slope for Cd169 vs. JSE treatment
slope_Il6t_cp <- summary(Il6_cp_model2)$coefficients[2, 1]


cat("Condition model:\n")
## Condition model:
cat("R² =", round(r2_Il6c_cp, 3), "\n") 
## R² = 0.268
cat("p-value =", signif(pval_Il6c_cp, 3), "\n")
## p-value = 0.189
cat("slope =", round(slope_Il6c_cp, 3), "\n")
## slope = -2.029
cat("Treatment model:\n")
## Treatment model:
cat("R² =", round(r2_Il6t_cp, 3), "\n") 
## R² = 0.195
cat("p-value =", signif(pval_Il6t_cp, 3), "\n")
## p-value = 0.151
cat("slope =", round(slope_Il6t_cp, 3), "\n")
## slope = -3.655
# Shared factor levels
all_groups <- c("BBS/HC", "BBS/IS", "M. aurum/HC", "M. aurum/IS")

# Colors
stoodis_colors <- c(
  "BBS/HC" = "#B3E1F0",
  "BBS/IS" = "#148CBA",
  "M. aurum/HC" = "#98E0B1",
  "M. aurum/IS" = "#21A951"
)

# Prepare condition data
Il6_JSE_cp_condition <- Il6_JSE_cp_condition %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Group = factor(group, levels = all_groups),
    mRNA = as.numeric(mRNA),
    JSE = as.numeric(JSE)
  )

# Prepare treatment data
Il6_JSE_cp_treatment <- Il6_JSE_cp_treatment %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Group = factor(group, levels = all_groups),
    mRNA = as.numeric(mRNA),
    JSE = as.numeric(JSE)
  )

# Panel A
Il6_JSE_cp_condition_plot <- ggplot(Il6_JSE_cp_condition, aes(x = mRNA, y = JSE, color = Group)) +
  geom_point(
    size = 3,
    alpha = 0.9
  ) +
   scale_color_manual(
    name = "Group",
    values = stoodis_colors,
    breaks = all_groups,
    labels = c(
      "BBS/HC",
      "BBS/IS",
      expression(italic("M. aurum") * "/HC"),
      expression(italic("M. aurum") * "/IS")
    ),
    drop = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_smooth(
    aes(group = 1),
    method = "lm",
    se = FALSE,
    color = "black",
    linewidth = 1,
    linetype = "solid"
  ) +
  stat_cor(
    aes(group = 1),
    method = "pearson",
    label.x = max(Il6_JSE_cp_condition$mRNA, na.rm = TRUE),
    label.y = max(Il6_JSE_cp_condition$JSE, na.rm = TRUE),
    size = 5,
    hjust = 1,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 18, color = "black"),
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.8),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0.5)
  ) +
     xlab(expression(atop("Relative choroid plexus " * italic(Il6) * " mRNA Expression"))) +
  ylab(expression(atop("Time Exploring Juvenile", "% of BBS/HC control")))

# Panel B
Il6_JSE_cp_treatment_plot <- ggplot(Il6_JSE_cp_treatment, aes(x = mRNA, y = JSE, color = Group)) +
  geom_point(
    size = 3,
    alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Group",
    values = stoodis_colors,
    breaks = all_groups,
    labels = c(
      "BBS/HC",
      "BBS/IS",
      expression(italic("M. aurum") * "/HC"),
      expression(italic("M. aurum") * "/IS")
    ),
    drop = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_smooth(
    aes(group = 1),
    method = "lm",
    se = FALSE,
    color = "black",
    linewidth = 1,
    linetype = "solid"
  ) +
  stat_cor(
    aes(group = 1),
    method = "pearson",
    label.x = max(Il6_JSE_cp_treatment$mRNA, na.rm = TRUE),
    label.y = max(Il6_JSE_cp_treatment$JSE, na.rm = TRUE),
    size = 5,
    hjust = 1,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 18, color = "black"),
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.8),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0.5)
  ) +
     xlab(expression(atop("Relative choroid plexus " * italic(Il6) * " mRNA Expression"))) +
  ylab(expression(atop("Time Exploring Juvenile", "% of BBS/HC control")))


# Arrange the two Il6 panels first
Il6_cp_panel_plots <- ggarrange(
  Il6_JSE_cp_condition_plot,
  Il6_JSE_cp_treatment_plot,
  ncol = 2,
  nrow = 1,
  labels = c("A", "B"),
  widths = c(1, 1),
  font.label = list(size = 50, face = "bold")
)
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'
# Dummy legend data
legend_Il6_cp_df <- data.frame(
  x = 1:4,
  y = 1:4,
  Group = factor(all_groups, levels = all_groups)
)

# Dummy legend plot
legend_Il6_cp_plot <- ggplot(legend_Il6_cp_df, aes(x = x, y = y, color = Group)) +
  geom_point(size = 4) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Group",
    values = stoodis_colors,
    breaks = all_groups,
    labels = c(
      "BBS/HC",
      "BBS/IS",
      expression(italic("M. aurum") * "/HC"),
      expression(italic("M. aurum") * "/IS")
    ),
    drop = FALSE
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    legend.title = element_text(size = 20),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 18),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

shared_Il6_cp_legend <- cowplot::get_legend(legend_Il6_cp_plot)

# Combine panels + legend
Il6_JSE_cp_plots <- ggarrange(
  Il6_cp_panel_plots,
  shared_Il6_cp_legend,
  ncol = 2,
  widths = c(1, 0.22)
)

# Save JPEG
ggsave(
  filename = "Maurum_data/R_figures/maurum_Il6_JSE_cp_plots.jpeg",
  plot = Il6_JSE_cp_plots,
  device = "jpeg",
  dpi = 600,
  width = 20,
  height = 10
)

# Save SVG
ggsave(
  filename = "Maurum_Data/R_figures/maurum_Il6_JSE_cp_plots.svg",
  plot = Il6_JSE_cp_plots,
  device = svglite::svglite,
  units = "in",
  width = 20,
  height = 10
)
